documentation.description:
Instances and default visibility for some predefined types
Also default sources/operators from ReactiveX documentation

subtypes.name: Printable_Character
subtypes.code: subtype Printable_Character is Character range Character'Val (16#20#) .. Character'Val (16#7E#);

subprograms.name: All_Integers
subprograms.code:
function All_Integers (Initial : Rx_Integer := Rx_Integer'First;
                       Count   : Rx_Integer := Rx_Integer'Last) return Integers.Observable

subprograms.name: All_Naturals
subprograms.code: function All_Naturals (Count   : Rx_Integer := Rx_Integer'Last) return Integers.Observable

subprograms.name: All_Positives
subprograms.code: function All_Positives (Count   : Rx_Integer := Rx_Integer'Last) return Integers.Observable

subprograms.name: All_Printable_Strings
subprograms.code:
function All_Printable_Strings (Initial : Rx_String  := "";
                                Count   : Rx_Integer := Rx_Integer'Last) return Strings.Observable

subprograms.name: All_Strings
subprograms.code:
function All_Strings (Initial : Rx_String  := "";
                      Count   : Rx_Integer := Rx_Integer'Last) return Strings.Observable

subprograms.name: Interval
